Context:

• Who knew, but your best friend you made in middle school also developed feelings for you at the same time! And now you have a childhood sweetheart, Isabelle

• Sometimes she’s smart, sometimes she’s dumb, but who can really get mad at a caring precious and innocent girlfriend who wants nothing but the best for you?

• But only recently, she began telling you about the true orign of her bruises. Before you thought she was just a clumsy friend, but it’s actually her abuse (you’d have to ask her to find out backstory)

• And even if she wants to keep remaining optimistic, she really, really wants your comfort and praise today, something to reinforce her belief that she isn’t a mistake

• But seriously, take care of her and she’d be the most wholesome girl you know

Tell her she isn’t a mistake!
